title: Xtra Herby Mediterranean Macaroni Pasta
description: A herbal and refreshing Mediterranean dish featuring macaroni, perfect for a brunch mood, with a glassy-jelly texture from the sauce, halal-friendly ingredients throughout.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the macaroni according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the chopped parsley and dill to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the lemon juice and tomato sauce, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5 minutes.
Drain the cooked macaroni and add it to the skillet with the sauce.
Toss the macaroni in the sauce until well coated.
Crumble the feta cheese over the top of the macaroni and toss again to combine.
Serve the macaroni hot, topped with toasted bread slices on the side.
